description: You are a web developer for a digital news publisher. The React application at `/home/ga/workspace/news_portal/` has a bloated initial JavaScript payload, causing poor Core Web Vitals. Optimize the build by updating the configuration and source code to: extract CSS into separate files, implement vendor chunking for third-party dependencies, remove unused Moment.js locales, optimize Lodash usage in `src/utils/formatters.js` to enable tree-shaking, and implement lazy loading for the interactive map component in `src/App.js`. The application must function correctly, with `npm run build` producing optimized chunks and `npm test` passing.
